description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex hip roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade features a double-door main entry, flanked by two sets of windows and two small balconies above, as well as a wide, multi-step entry staircase. On one side, there is an attached garage with two doors and a paved driveway. The rear of the house showcases a row of large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a balcony with a railing, suggesting a living or entertainment area with ample natural light. The side elevations display a mix of smaller windows and a secondary balcony, contributing to an asymmetrical yet balanced appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan color, with black and gray accents on the roof, railings, and window frames.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a dark hip roof, light-colored walls, prominent balconies, and an attached garage. The design features large windows and a multi-step entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entry, two balconies above, wide entry steps, and the attached garage on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a mix of small windows with a secondary balcony visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a row of large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a long balcony with railing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with multiple vertical windows and a small balcony, showing the house's depth and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with wide steps, small overhang, and two upper balconies above the entrance.
